title: Telegram node can't parse entities due to formatting issues
symptom: When sending a message through the Telegram node, n8n throws 'Bad Request: can't parse entities'. This indicates a problem with the message formatting.
applies_when: Message contains Markdown or HTML formatting
not_this_if: Message is plain text without formatting
root_cause: The error occurs when the message sent to Telegram contains invalid Markdown or HTML syntax, such as unclosed tags or special characters that are not properly escaped. Telegram requires specific formatting rules to be followed, and any deviation can lead to parsing errors.
fix_steps: Check the message content for unclosed Markdown or HTML tags
Escape any special characters that may cause issues
Trim the message length to below 1024 bytes if necessary
agent_instruction: Ensure the message formatting is correct and switch to 'MarkdownV2' or 'HTML' as needed.
